newsSince: No material company-specific news in the June 9-23 window. Q2 FY26 (ended Feb 28) missed badly (EPS $1.15 vs ~$1.60 est, revenue -7% y/y) but was reported before this window; Q3 FY26 results are scheduled for July 2, 2026, after this refresh. No new data on the irrigation-telemetry / water-management thesis.

sources.label: Lindsay Q3 FY26 earnings set for July 2 (StockTitan)
Lindsay Q2 earnings miss, revenue -7% y/y (Yahoo)

verdicts.rankRationale: No material news in the June 9-23 window; Q3 print is not until July 2. The latent-strict thesis (irrigation telemetry, remote monitoring, scarce-water site-management know-how) is unchanged. YTD -2.56% means no rerating chase to penalize, so rank 1 stands ahead of the catalyst.
verdicts.bull: Water-efficiency/telemetry know-how could become scarce site-management capability for water-stressed compute campuses.
verdicts.neutral: Pure ag-irrigation/infrastructure today; AI-water linkage is latent, not realized.
verdicts.bear: Q2 miss (-53% EPS, rev -7%) shows soft core demand; AI angle remains speculative.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: July 2 Q3 print; data-center water-management pilot or MENA project progress.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Weak ag cycle and another earnings miss with no AI catalyst.
